sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("All nodes:")
for n in seg:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")

adj = current_frame.segmentation['adjacency_list']
print(f"\nAdjacency: {adj}")

# Find the yellow L-shape (not the edge strip)
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"\nYellow id={n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
